title: clusia haughtii
intro: Clusia haughtii, also known as the ballroom tree or Mexican firecracker plant, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. The leaves and bark of Clusia haughtii have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them useful in treating wounds, infections, and other health issues. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Clusia haughtii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be applied topically as a poultice or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
